Subject: Prairie Island Contingent Bid RFP pre-bid Conference CallMeeting
Message:
Sent on behalf of Rick Peterson.

The Prairie Island Contingent Bid - RFP,  pre-bid conference call
meeting is scheduled for next Monday, December 3rd from 3-5 PM CST.
Please mark your calendars.

Listed below is the information for the conference call we have
scheduled on our Latitude system:
=20
Toll free number      (800) 328-8226x5444
Direct Dial                 (612) 904-5444    (within the company please
dial 8 instead of area code)
GO and Ren Sq         5444
=20
The system will prompt callers with the following questions:
=20
1.      To attend a meeting press 1.
2.      Enter the meeting ID number followed by the pound key (892#)=20
3.      At the tone, please speak your name or location, when finished
press the pound key.
=20
The first caller will receive the following message:  You are the first
person on this call, to stop the music press the star key.
=20
The names of entrants will be announced as they join the meeting.
=20
If participants need assistance during the call they can press # 0 and
they will get an operator.
=20
